title: Pharmacodynamics of Caplacizumab in Healthy Volunteers and Phase 2/3 Trial Patients with Immune-mediated Thrombotic Thrombocytopenic Purpura.
abstract: Immune-mediated thrombotic thrombocytopenic purpura (iTTP) is caused by autoantibody-mediated deficiency of ADAMTS13 activity, leading to formation of platelet-rich microthrombi. The inhibitory effect of caplacizumab on von Willebrand factor (VWF)-platelet interactions and its rapid kinetics were characterized.
